series_metadata.series_description: Applications, license, state & federal background checks, insurance or bond certificates, affidavits, photos, background reimbursement forms & proof of receipt, correspondence, not to include license fees/receipts of funds records that require state audit.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and verified as readable. ; Electronic: 2 years including all renewals, or 2 years after denial, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
